title: A Single README.md File Went Viral. The Reason Is Embarrassingly Simple.
subtitle: 91,000 stars on GitHub. No code. Four simple rules that every coding agent should follow.
content:
This incredible story shows the power of simplicity in software development.

A GitHub repository with just a README.md file gained 91,000 stars. No complex code, no fancy frameworks, just pure clarity and helpful guidance.

What makes this approach so powerful?

1. Clarity: Every instruction is crystal clear
2. Simplicity: No unnecessary complexity
3. Usefulness: Directly solves real problems
4. Shareability: Easy to understand and teach others

In our world of 10,000 line codebases and complex architectures, sometimes the most viral ideas are the simplest ones.

This reminds us that good documentation and clear thinking can be just as valuable as code itself.
